node: MuSK (muscle-specific kinase) on the agrin-LRP4-MuSK-DOK7 NMJ-stabilization axis
compound_class: first-in-class humanized agonist monoclonal antibody targeting the MuSK Frizzled-like domain
direction: AGONIST - activates MuSK, stabilizes NMJ, increases muscle strength (correct direction for a mimetic)
novelty_statement: The not-yet-made connection: NMJ/MuSK stabilization as an exercise-mimetic strategy for age-related sarcopenia. PubMed: 0 hits for 'neuromuscular junction'+'exercise mimetic'+aging/sarcopenia. Every ARGX-119 trial indication is a rare neuromuscular disease (CMS/ALS/SMA); none is sarcopenia/aging.

why_over_alternatives.vs OXPHOS/PGC-1a: clean reversal but saturated prior art (AMPK/PPARd/sirtuins/PGC-1a excluded)
why_over_alternatives.vs NT-1654 agrin fragment: NT-1654 real but acts UPSTREAM (supplies ligand), still cleaved by neurotrypsin; ARGX-119 acts at the receptor DOWNSTREAM of the aging lesion + is Ph2 vs preclinical
why_over_alternatives.vs TrkB/7,8-DHF: 76 PubMed hits TrkB+'exercise mimetic' - well-trodden, weaker novelty
why_over_alternatives.vs PIEZO1/Yoda1: bidirectional KLF15/IL-6 atrophy liability; Yoda1 only a tool compound

next_gen_note: Forward-looking (NOT primary): novel oral small-molecule MuSK/DOK7 potentiator as next-gen extension.
